reference: Hello, thank you for choosing Health Care Management Institute. If your blood test and scanning results are negative, then there is a strong possibility of ulcerative colitis, and the colonoscopy is the only way to confirm it. If it turns negative, then proceed with a stool examination; this will clarify the situation, or consider a barium meal study. If every test shows no abnormality, then this could be related to anxiety or depression. Have a nice day.
text: Hello, thank you for choosing Healthcare Management Institute. If your blood test and scanning results are negative, then there is a strong possibility of ulcerative colitis, and the colonoscopy is the only way to confirm it. If it turns negative, then proceed with a stool exam. This will clarify the situation or consider a barium mean study. If every test shows no abnormality, then this could be due to anxiety or depression. Have a nice day.
